What Makes a Great Sounding Pickup? Brian Porter From Porter Pickups Answers Our Questions.
snippet.description:
#addictedtogear #Porterpickups 

Today we discuss what makes a great sounding pickup and why some pickups simply fall short of hitting the mark. Our resident expert Brian Porter from Porter Pickups answers our questions.

snippet.title: Brian Porter video: ‘I’ve always believed banking is a calling’
snippet.description:
Scotiabank President and CEO announces his retirement, appointment of Scott Thomson as Bank’s new top executive

After nearly 10 years as Scotiabank’s President and Chief Executive Officer, Brian Porter has announced he is retiring. Scott Thomson, currently CEO of Finning International Inc. and a member of Scotiabank’s Board of Directors since 2016, will take over.

“During this time, we've accomplished a lot,” Porter said in a video for Scotiabank’s 90,000 employees in which he announced his retirement and Thomson’s succession to the role. “We made the Bank more resilient. We've spent a lot of time and focus on digitizing the Bank and the customer experience, making it easier for our customers to do business with us and our employees to do their roles as well.”

snippet.title: Porter Pickups // Brian Porter // Starting a guitar pickup company (make more music interview)
snippet.description:
Original Air Date: 3/22/2021

EPISODE 42 // Welcome back to Make More Music, the podcast that connects people to music & one another. Today we chat with owner of Porter Pickups / Porter Guitars and season three sponsor, Brian Porter. He shares his musical backstory and organic growth of Porter Pickups, learning through failure, and staying people oriented through his business mission.

Check out Porter Pickups - https://porterpickups.com
Porter Pickups on IG - https://instagram.com/porterpickups

Support the show -
